{ "name": "phpoption/phpoption", "description": "Option Type for PHP", "keywords": ["php", "option", "language", "type"], "license": "Apache-2.0", "authors": [ { "name": "Johannes M. Schmitt", "email": "schmittjoh@gmail.com", "homepage": "https://github.com/schmittjoh" }, { "name": "Graham Campbell", "email": "hello@gjcampbell.co.uk", "homepage": "https://github.com/GrahamCampbell" } ], "require": { "php": "^7.2.5 || ^8.0" }, "require-dev": { "bamarni/composer-bin-plugin": "^1.8.2", "phpunit/phpunit": "^8.5.44 || ^9.6.25 || ^10.5.53 || ^11.5.34" }, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "PhpOption\\": "src/PhpOption/" } }, "autoload-dev": { "psr-4": { "PhpOption\\Tests\\": "tests/PhpOption/Tests/" } }, "config": { "allow-plugins": { "bamarni/composer-bin-plugin": true }, "preferred-install": "dist" }, "extra": { "bamarni-bin": { "bin-links": true, "forward-command": false }, "branch-alias": { "dev-master": "1.9-dev" } } }
